findings.location: section: messaging-log-settings — HTTPメッセージフォーマットのプレースホルダ説明
findings.description: The knowledge file states "（$replyTo$, $timeToLive$ は使用不可）" for HTTP message format placeholders. The source never explicitly says these are unavailable — it simply omits them from the HTTP placeholder lists. The explicit "使用不可" claim is an inference not present in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source only lists available placeholders for httpSentMessageFormat and httpReceivedMessageFormat without any statement that $replyTo$ or $timeToLive$ are unavailable or unsupported.

findings.description: The knowledge file states "httpReceivedMessageFormatデフォルト: httpSentMessageFormatと同様" but this is inaccurate. The two defaults differ in their label: httpSent uses "@@@@ HTTP SENT MESSAGE @@@@" and httpReceived uses "@@@@ HTTP RECEIVED MESSAGE @@@@". An AI using this description might report the wrong default label for httpReceivedMessageFormat.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows httpReceivedMessageFormat default explicitly as: "@@@@ HTTP RECEIVED MESSAGE @@@@\n\tthread_name = ...", which differs from httpSentMessageFormat's "@@@@ HTTP SENT MESSAGE @@@@" label.
